EASTERN MEDITERRANEAN SEA.
LIBYA.
DNC 08, DNC 09.

REQUESTING ASSISTANCE IN:

B. 33-15N 014-08E.

SHARP LOOKOUT, ASSIST IF POSSIBLE.
